title: 1.1.1. Membrane protein separation
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"68l84","text":"Separation of membrane and cytoplasmic protein.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cubu1","text":"If necessary perform acetone precipitation of the protein following protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6so4t","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Using micro-centrifuge in the lab Spin 17,000 g for 30 minutes Transfer supernatant (Cytoplasmic fraction), wash the pellet with cold PBS and resuspend in 100ul of PBS (membrane fraction)

Use Ultracentrifuge (100,000 g, 4 o C)- Talk to *Barry Bruce Lab 226 Hesler Biology Building Transfer supernatant (cytoplasmic fraction), wash pellet with cold PBS and resuspend in 100ul of PBS (membrane fraction)

The separate inner and outer membrane(subcellular fractionation) Ultracentrifuge (100,000 g, 4 o C, 45 minutes)- Talk to*Barry Bruce Lab 226 Hesler Biology Building Transfer supernatant (cytoplasmic fraction), wash pellet with cold PBS Resuspend the pellet in 200ul of 0.2% sodium sarcosinate. Mix properly. Incubate at room temperature for 30 minutes Centrifuge at 100,000 g, 4 o C, 15 minutes), transfer supernatant (inner membrane protein), wash pellet with cold PBS, and resuspend in 100 ul of PBS.

*Barry Brucelab: Set up the time for ultracentrifugation (use the signup sheet next to the ultracentrifuge). Use table top OptimaTM Max Ultracentrifuge (35,000 RPM = ~104000g), Beckman Coulter with 55 TLA rotor Have your samples balanced Turn the power ON. Press DOOR to unlock the chamber door; slid the door open Get the rotor 55 TLA from 4 o C, load your samples and install the rotor Close the door chamber (light on DOOR should go away), press SPEED and enter 35000, press TIME, and enter your run time, press ENTER and START. After the run is complete, press DOOR to unlock the chamber door. Take out your samples. Clean the rotor if necessary and place it back at 4 o C. Slid the door close and turn off the machine.
creator: Eadewunm
